title: Rhynchosia barbertonensis
taxonomy: Rhynchosia barbertonensis belongs to the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as legumes. The genus Rhynchosia is a part of the subfamily Faboideae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Rhynchosia barbertonensis is a specific species within this genus and family, identified by its unique characteristics and distribution. The classification of Rhynchosia barbertonensis is further refined to the order Fabales, which comprises a range of plant families including Fabaceae. Understanding the classification of Rhynchosia barbertonensis provides valuable insights into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
